Elantra > Body and Frame > Quarter Panel > Service and Repair > Weld Points

WELD POINTS — REAR QUARTER PANEL
Hyundai Elantra 2023

WELDING SPECIFICATIONS
Number of weld points: 42 resistance spot welds
MIG plug welds: 8 locations
Weld diagram reference: Hyundai sheet QP-2023-EL

RESISTANCE SPOT WELDING (SRSW) LOCATIONS
Rear roof rail flange:      12 weld nuggets at 30mm pitch
D-pillar inner:             10 weld nuggets at 25mm pitch
Quarter inner reinforcement: 20 weld nuggets at 28mm pitch

PLUG WELD LOCATIONS
Rocker flange:  8 holes, 8mm diameter, per weld schedule

WELD PREPARATION
Weld flange preparation: Remove zinc coating in weld zone before welding.
Heat affected zone: Apply anti-corrosion primer after all welding operations.

Hyundai specifies MIG welding for all external flange positions.
Spot weld diameter: minimum 4mm nugget per Hyundai weld specification.
